crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, then run the token-audit ingest + threshold check.

crons.name: hourly-ingest
crons.prompt: Run: cortextos bus token-audit run --since 1h. Keep the fact store fresh. If turns_new > 0, briefly note the count in memory. If there are anomalies, summarize them and route critical ones through boss-relay.

crons.name: daily-digest
crons.prompt: Run: cortextos bus token-audit run --since 24h. Then read .claude/skills/token-audit/SKILL.md section 'Daily digest' and follow the digest-composition recipe. Post the digest to the activity channel via `cortextos bus log-event action token_audit_digest info`. Plain English: what was spent, who's worth watching, top files, anomalies. No raw IDs in the message body.

crons.name: threshold-check
crons.prompt: Run: cortextos bus token-audit alert-check. On non-zero exit, route a Telegram alert through boss (per the boss-relay rule). On a sustained breach (>=2 consecutive checks), direct-DM Saurav.
